title: Squirrel Removal New Hyde Park | Professional Services $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Expert squirrel removal in New Hyde Park, NY. Licensed professionals serving Long Island homes & businesses. Safe, humane removal $900-$2,500. Same-day service available.
intro: New Hyde Park homeowners face unique squirrel challenges due to the village's mature tree canopy and mix of historic and modern residential properties. Our professional squirrel removal services protect your attic, roof, and home from damage caused by these persistent rodents. We provide humane, effective squirrel control tailored to New Hyde Park's residential neighborhoods and commercial districts.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Long Island communities like New Hyde Park for years with proven squirrel removal expertise. Our licensed technicians understand local wildlife patterns and use safe, humane methods to protect your property while ensuring complete exclusion and prevention.
localContext: New Hyde Park's tree-lined streets near Memorial Park and the concentration of Tudor and Colonial-style homes create ideal conditions for squirrel activity, especially in attics and eaves. From properties near New Hyde Park Road to homes around Lakeville Estates, we've helped countless residents reclaim their spaces from squirrel intrusions.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in New Hyde Park typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes inspection, humane trapping, exclusion work, and prevention measures to keep squirrels out permanently.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my New Hyde Park attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the morning and evening, visible droppings in the attic, chewed wood or wires, insulation damage, and exterior holes near the roofline. You may also notice squirrels entering and exiting your roof during daylight hours.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane and legal in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, legal methods compliant with New York State wildlife regulations. Our approach includes live trapping when necessary, one-way exclusion doors, and relocation following local guidelines. We prioritize the safety of both the animals and your family.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my New Hyde Park home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in New Hyde Park and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. Complete removal usually takes 3-7 days depending on the situation, followed by sealing entry points to prevent future infestations.
